pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm walking through a museum of a life that doesn't exist anymore. there's no point to any of it. i wake up and for a second i forget, and then it hits me all over again. just a massive, empty hole where everything used to be.

pool.baseline: i was just reading about the heat death of the universe... it's kind of hard to care about anything when you think about it like that. like, everything we do, every single struggle or achievement, it all just gets wiped out eventually. it feels like a joke. nothing actually matters in the long run.

pool.baseline: it's 3am here and i'm just sitting in this tiny apartment staring at the wall. honestly sometimes i feel like if i just stopped existing tomorrow, the world wouldn't even skip a beat. like i'm just a ghost passing through these cities. no one knows me here, no one really knows me back home anymore either. just feels like a lot of effort to keep being a person when it doesn't even matter.
